title: Termination, Budgets, Timeouts, and Progress Detection · Goal Brief: Success Stop
summary: Stop an agent safely under success, failure, budget, and no-progress conditions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops success stop increment in a loop termination and budget policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Terminate only when completion evidence satisfies the goal contract.
Record intended and observed side effects for idempotency and audit.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
